overall.description: A cinematic night drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city highway from the game Cyberpunk 2077. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and giant holographic fish swimming through the air above an empty, wet reflective highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated futuristic highway with reflective wet surface

agents.ego_description: driving forward along the empty neon-lit highway, approaching the city center

entered.detail: giant glowing orange holographic koi fish swimming in the sky above the highway
multi-lane futuristic highway with glowing blue and yellow lane markers
luminescent blue and cyan light strips embedded in the road surface
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows forming the downtown skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a forward drive along an elevated futuristic highway at night. The wet asphalt reflects the glowing blue lane markers and neon city lights. A giant orange holographic fish swims in the sky ahead, while the glass skyscraper cluster of the downtown district rises in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass section with structural supports

events.description: camera pans left to reveal a large holographic blue whale projected on a building facade

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive while panning left to observe the surrounding architecture and holograms

entered.detail: large blue glowing holographic whale displayed on the side of a skyscraper
structural columns supporting the elevated highway deck with yellow safety railings

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left while driving, revealing a massive blue holographic whale projected onto a nearby building. The view shifts to show the highway's structural support pillars and underdeck, with the orange holographic fish now visible to the left. The Militech building becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon between mega-skyscrapers with aerial holograms

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the towering skyscrapers and aerial holograms
giant blue holographic fish emerges from behind buildings and swims across the sky

agents.ego_description: driving while looking upward at the towering architecture and holographic displays

entered.detail: tall black skyscraper with prominent yellow 'MILITECH' signage and vertical light strips
giant glowing blue holographic fish with flowing fins swimming through the air
tall digital advertisement screens mounted on building facades

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the imposing Militech skyscraper dominating the center frame, its yellow neon signage glowing against the night sky. The orange holographic fish swims past on the left, followed by the appearance of a massive blue holographic fish from the right. Vertical neon billboards illuminate the surrounding towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway interchange with merging lanes

events.description: camera tilts down to return to highway level and continues driving forward

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the highway through the interchange, navigating the curved road

entered.detail: large orange holographic sign displaying 'BREAKING NEWS' on a building facade
curved elevated roadway structure crossing above the current path

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to highway level and continues driving through a complex interchange of elevated roadways. The Militech building and holographic fish disappear from view as the camera focuses on the road ahead. A 'BREAKING NEWS' hologram becomes visible on a distant building, and the highway curves gently through the urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway curve with view of downtown holograms

events.description: camera turns left to track the giant orange holographic fish swimming alongside the highway

agents.ego_description: driving while turning left to follow the curve of the highway and observe the holographic fish

entered.detail: dense collection of illuminated high-rise buildings forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left along a curved section of highway, bringing the giant orange holographic fish back into prominent view as it swims through the sky. The downtown glass skyscraper cluster reappears in the distance, while the Breaking News hologram moves out of frame. The drive continues through the neon-lit urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a futuristic elevated highway that weaves through a neon-drenched urban canyon dominated by massive holographic creatures. It begins with a forward glide over wet, reflective asphalt toward a distant cluster of glass skyscrapers, while a giant orange holographic fish swims through the night sky. As the camera turns left, the view shifts to reveal a massive blue holographic whale projected onto a building and the structural underdeck of the highway before tilting upward to frame the imposing Militech skyscraper and its glowing yellow signage. The perspective then returns to road level, navigating a complex interchange of elevated roadways where a Breaking News hologram flickers in the distance. Finally, the camera curves left to bring the orange holographic fish back into prominent view as the drive continues toward the shimmering downtown skyline.
